name: @prune/marginal-value
description: F8 — marginal-value probe. A gated counterfactual replay measures which sent chunks had ZERO realized value: for each chunk, the host re-ran the turn with the chunk withheld and the existing @prune/equivalence gate judged whether the output was unchanged. A chunk whose removal leaves the output equivalent contributed nothing — pure waste. This package turns those caller-fed equivalence verdicts into a waste accounting and into F1-shaped contribution observations. Deterministic set arithmetic; the equivalence verdict is caller-fed; no model call, no regex.
